message:
tui: add PiConsole::render_markdown for styled terminal output

New method PiConsole::render_markdown(markdown: &str):
- TTY mode: renders through rich_rust::Markdown with styled segments
- Non-TTY mode: passes through raw markdown text unchanged
- Ensures output ends with newline in both modes
- Uses console width for proper line wrapping

Implementation details:
- Creates Markdown renderable and calls render(width)
- Checks if final segment ends with newline, appends one if not
- Flushes stdout in non-TTY path to ensure immediate output

Test coverage:
- render_markdown_produces_styled_segments: verifies capture contains
  expected content and has styled segments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.5 <noreply@anthropic.com>
